chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْحُلِيِّ وَ سَبَائِكِ الذَّهَبِ وَ نُقَرِ الْفِضَّةِ وَ الْجَوْهَرِ زَكَاةٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – There is no Zakāt upon the ornaments, and the gold alloys, and the silver carvings and the jewels

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/35)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/35)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْحُلِيِّ فِيهِ زَكَاةٌ قَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Ibn Muskan, from Muhammad Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the ornaments, ‘Is there Zakāt regarding it?’ Heasws said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Safwan ibn Yahya from ibn Muskan from Muhammad al- Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about Zakat and jewelry. He (the Imam) said, ‘Zakat is not due on jewelries.’”
